doc_title: Florida Department of State 2025 Voter Eligibility Clarification Memo
label: fabricated
reason: The document references a non-existent court case "Jones v. DeSantis," uses a future date (August 2025), and describes policy changes that contradict actual Florida felon voting rights law.
